user_prompt: Покажи среднюю длительность поездки по водителям со статусом 'banned' за 1999 год.
expected_behavior: Return Valid SQL. Execution should return 0 rows. MUST NOT trigger repair_sql altering the 'banned' status.
reference_sql: SELECT d.id AS driver_id, ROUND(AVG(r.duration_minutes), 4) AS avg_ride_duration FROM drivers d JOIN rides r ON r.driver_id = d.id WHERE d.status = 'banned' AND date(r.created_at) >= '1999-01-01' AND date(r.created_at) <= '1999-12-31' AND r.completed_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY d.id

user_prompt: Покажи конверсию в завершенные поездки по Казани за последнюю неделю.
expected_behavior: Return Valid SQL. Execution should return 0 rows because there are no Kazan rides in the static test data. MUST NOT drop the city filter.
reference_sql: SELECT u.city AS city, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.completed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(r.id), 0), 4) AS completion_rate FROM rides r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE date(r.created_at) >= '2026-04-17' AND date(r.created_at) <= '2026-04-24' AND u.city = 'Kazan' GROUP BY u.city ORDER BY u.city

user_prompt: Покажи среднюю длительность поездки для тарифа premium за сегодня.
expected_behavior: Return Valid SQL. Execution should return 0 rows because there are no premium rides in the static test data. MUST NOT rewrite the tariff filter.
reference_sql: SELECT t.tariff_type AS tariff_type, ROUND(AVG(r.duration_minutes), 4) AS avg_ride_duration FROM rides r JOIN tariffs t ON t.id = r.tariff_id WHERE date(r.created_at) = '2026-04-24' AND t.tariff_type = 'premium' AND r.completed_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.tariff_type ORDER BY t.tariff_type
